label: California Consumers Legal Remedies Act (Civil Code §1750 et seq.)
snippet: California Consumers Legal Remedies Act prohibits unfair or deceptive acts or practices in consumer transactions, including misrepresenting goods or services and unfair fee practices.

label: California Consumer Privacy Act (CCPA) — oag.ca.gov
snippet: The CCPA gives consumers rights regarding personal information collected by businesses, including notice, access, deletion, and limits on sale or sharing of personal information.

label: California Unfair Competition Law (Bus. & Prof. Code §17200)
snippet: Unfair competition includes any unlawful, unfair or fraudulent business act or practice and unfair, deceptive, untrue or misleading advertising.

label: Washington Consumer Protection Act (RCW 19.86)
snippet: Washington's Consumer Protection Act declares unfair or deceptive acts or practices in trade or commerce unlawful and provides enforcement and consumer remedies.

label: Washington My Health My Data / privacy overview — Washington AG
snippet: Washington Attorney General privacy resources address consumer privacy expectations, data practices, and related state protections relevant to how companies handle personal information.

label: Oregon Unlawful Trade Practices Act (ORS 646.605 et seq.)
snippet: Oregon's Unlawful Trade Practices Act prohibits unconscionable tactics and unfair or deceptive conduct in trade or commerce, including certain fee and disclosure issues.

label: Oregon Consumer Protection — Oregon DOJ
snippet: Oregon Department of Justice consumer protection guidance covers unfair business practices, scams, and consumer complaint processes relevant to consumer-facing companies.

label: California courts — arbitration / unconscionability context (judicial branch resources)
snippet: California consumer contract disputes frequently raise issues around arbitration clauses, class action waivers, and unconscionability; overbroad dispute waivers can face enforceability challenges.

label: FTC — .com Disclosures / digital notices guidance
snippet: Federal Trade Commission guidance emphasizes clear, conspicuous disclosures for material terms, fees, and conditions in digital consumer interfaces.

label: CFPB — consumer banking / deposit account practices
snippet: Consumer Financial Protection Bureau materials address deposit accounts, fees, account access, and practices that can surprise consumers in banking and payments products.
